name: Sionna Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Sionna Therapeutics Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for cystic fibrosis (CF) by targeting the primary cause of the disease – the cystic fibrosis transmembrane conductance regulator (CFTR) protein. Sionna is headquartered in Lexington, Massachusetts. They are working to restore CFTR function and improve outcomes for people with CF.
